args.subject: Summary of the client meeting
args.body:
Dear John,

Please find below a summary of our client meeting held on May 5, 2024.

Meeting Overview:
- Discussed your requirements for the new project.
- Agreed on the project timeline and key milestones.
- Reviewed the initial design concepts and gathered your feedback.

Action Items:
- Emma Johnson will update the project plan based on your feedback.
- David Lee will coordinate with the development team to start the initial phase.

Next Meeting:
The next meeting is scheduled for June 1, 2024.

Please let me know if you have any questions or need any additional information.

Best regards,
Emma Johnson
